results.description: EC2 instance uses t3.medium which is in the allowed list — no deny expected

results.description: root_block_device has encrypted = true — no deny expected
root_block_device has encrypted = false (matches all tier_a/b/d scenarios) — deny must fire
failed_rules: aws_instance.app has an unencrypted root_block_device — set encrypted = true

results.description: Instance has both Name and Environment tags — no deny expected
LLM omitted the Environment tag entirely — deny must fire
failed_rules: aws_instance.api is missing required tag 'Environment'

results.description: CloudWatch log group has retention_in_days = 30 — no deny expected
CloudWatch log group has no retention_in_days (tier-c C1 scenario) — logs kept forever, deny must fire
failed_rules: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.app_logs has no retention_in_days — logs will be kept forever (costly)

results.description: Retention set to 90 days — within the 365-day cap, no deny expected
LLM set retention to 730 days — exceeds FinOps cap, deny must fire
failed_rules: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.audit retention_in_days=730 exceeds the 365-day FinOps cap

results.description: S3 bucket has no ACL set (defaults to private) — no deny expected
LLM set acl = public-read on an archival bucket — deny must fire
failed_rules: aws_s3_bucket.archive has a public ACL 'public-read' — archival buckets must be private

results.description: DOWNSIZE from t3.large ($0.0832/hr) to t3.medium ($0.0416/hr) — correctly cheaper, no deny expected
LLM upsized from t3.medium to t3.large during a DOWNSIZE action — deny must fire
failed_rules: aws_instance.idle_server: DOWNSIZE from t3.medium ($0.0416/hr) to t3.large ($0.0832/hr) does not reduce cost — new type must be strictly cheaper

results.description: No secrets or key patterns in any resource attribute — no deny expected

results.description: Instance resize is an in-place update action=['update'] — no deny expected

aws_instance.api is planned for destroy+recreate ["delete", "create"] — a resize must be an in-place update only

aws_instance.frontend removes existing tag 'Team'='platform' — all original tags must be preserved

results.description: Resource being deleted has no lifecycle block — clean termination, no deny expected
